pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 specifications, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not recognize Java 21 syntax or may fail to invoke the Java 21 compiler correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 class files.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze class files compiled with Java 21, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the modern release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: While source/target still works, using 'release' is the standard for cross-compilation in modern Java and ensures consistent module path and API usage for the target version.

src/main/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Fil.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for creating Path instances.
